assertions.description: The analyzer correctly identifies all 14 components (R401, JP401, JP402, J401, U401, R403, U402, J402, C401, D401, R402, C402, C403, C404). CAN_H and CAN_L nets are correctly populated with both transceivers. The bus_analysis.can section correctly lists both CAN_H and CAN_L nets with U401 and U402 as devices. The ERC warning correctly flags RX-CAN having two output drivers (U401 pin RXD and U402 pin RXD in parallel). Power domains correctly attribute +3.3V to U401 (VCC1) and U402 (VCC), and ISO_5V to U401 (VCC2). The SM712 TVS diode (D401) on CAN bus lines is correctly classified as a diode.
